body:
This PR starts to port functionality over from [GB-25](https://github.com/PRONTOLab/GB-25) for testing the correctness of reactant-compiled kernels that perform basic Oceananigans tasks, like filling halos or computing tendencies.

This PR starts with tests for fill halo regions. 

cc @giordano @wsmoses

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

title: (0.105.4) Add basic tests for Reactant-Oceananigans correctness
